label: Week 1 — Fresh Start
description: New semester energy. Optimism is high. Workload feels manageable.

label: Week 2 — Settling In
description: Routines forming. Social energy still high. First assignments appear.

label: Week 3 — The Grind Begins
description: Novelty has worn off. Workload picks up. Sleep starts slipping.

label: Week 4 — First Pressure
description: First deadlines hit. Students begin feeling behind for the first time.

label: Week 5 — Building Anxiety
description: Midterms visible on the horizon. Weather turning. Days getting shorter.

label: Week 6 — Midterm Buildup
description: Peak pre-midterm anxiety. Sleep deprivation common. Social withdrawal begins.

label: Week 7 — The Wall
description: The hardest week. Midterms. Cold weather. Shortened daylight. Isolation peaks.

label: Week 8 — False Recovery
description: Midterms over but students are depleted. Dangerous overcompensation period.

label: Week 9 — The Dark Stretch
description: Most underestimated week. Finals not here yet but pressure mounts silently.

label: Week 10 — Late Semester Grind
description: Caffeine dependency peaks. Motivation at its lowest. Light at end of tunnel not visible.

label: Week 11 — Finals Approach
description: Final projects and papers collide. Students making difficult tradeoffs.

label: Week 12 — Finals
description: Peak academic stress. Adrenaline kicks in. Community suffering together.
